branch_manifest.description: LEFT JOIN matches — customer with matching sales row returns all columns populated
LEFT JOIN no match — customer with no matching sales returns customer columns with NULL sales columns
Empty source — no rows in either table returns no result rows

unit_tests.name: test_select_join_match
unit_tests.sql: SELECT c.CustomerKey, c.FirstName, c.LastName, f.SalesOrderNumber, f.OrderDate, f.SalesAmount FROM [silver].[DimCustomer] c LEFT JOIN [silver].[FactInternetSales] f ON c.CustomerKey = f.CustomerKey ORDER BY c.CustomerKey, f.SalesOrderNumber;

unit_tests.name: test_select_join_nomatch
unit_tests.sql: SELECT c.CustomerKey, c.FirstName, c.LastName, f.SalesOrderNumber, f.OrderDate, f.SalesAmount FROM [silver].[DimCustomer] c LEFT JOIN [silver].[FactInternetSales] f ON c.CustomerKey = f.CustomerKey ORDER BY c.CustomerKey, f.SalesOrderNumber;

unit_tests.name: test_select_empty_source
unit_tests.sql: SELECT c.CustomerKey, c.FirstName, c.LastName, f.SalesOrderNumber, f.OrderDate, f.SalesAmount FROM [silver].[DimCustomer] c LEFT JOIN [silver].[FactInternetSales] f ON c.CustomerKey = f.CustomerKey ORDER BY c.CustomerKey, f.SalesOrderNumber;
